name: stp
description: Straight To Production — your CTO in a plugin.

plugins.name: stp
plugins.description: Your CTO in a plugin. 7 skills, 14 stacks, stack-aware, pace-aware, code-graph-aware. Universal across web / CRM / C++ / C# / Rust / game cheats / embedded / mods. Opus 4.7 plans, Sonnet 4.6 executes. Aider-style repo map bundled for offline code understanding.
